page_title: PACHINKO GODZILLA vs. EVANGELION: Second Impact G
text:
is a pachinko machine developed by Bisty. This machine has an original story of a crossover between Rebuild of Evangelion and Godzilla an sequel to P Godzilla vs. Evangelion ~G Cell Awakening~. The theme song is "Gathering" by Megumi Hayashibara. https://king-cr.jp/artist/hayashi/news/ .

History

After the first invasion of King Ghidorah is foiled by Godzilla and NERV team effort. NERV develops a new weapon in order to act as a safeguard against the mysterious actions of Godzilla: The Type 3 Kiryū (Mechagodzilla). 

However in a new invasion on Earth, now by the Xiliens, they revived Gigan, Rodan, Biollante and Kaiser Ghidorah, creating chaos around various places in the world. As NERV fights each monster, they suffer a great loss when the Xilien Commander steals the Type 3 Kiryū and use it against NERV.

Biollante cells invade Asuka Shikinami Langley's conscience, making her take a new form as Biollante Asuka, allowing it to grow in size as Biollante Asuka acts in a destructive manner by hating everyone and everything.

As the problems escalates, Gendo Ikari decides to use the G Cells to alter Unit-01 to make more effective in the battle. However, Kaworu Nagisa controlling the Shiryū has other plans for Shinji. https://youtu.be/ZSd-yrPh8mA?si=ZwrIOcDSj6kQjTCl
